## Checklist

- [ ] Builds cleanly with `-DCKSUMX_WARNINGS_AS_ERRORS=ON`
- [ ] `./tests/run_tests.sh` (or `ctest`) passes with no failures
- [ ] Code formatted with `clang-format`
- [ ] Public API changes documented with `///` Doxygen comments
- [ ] README / CHANGELOG updated where user-facing
- [ ] No secrets, absolute paths, or machine-specific artifacts committed
